title: matelea angustifolia
intro: Matelea angustifolia, also known as the Antelope Horns, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Matelea angustifolia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Matelea angustifolia can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
